title: Flatbed Trailer Rental
description: Transportation solutions for steel, containers, industrial materials, and general cargo.
overview: Our flatbed trailer rental services provide versatile and reliable transportation for a wide range of industrial loads. Whether you are moving construction materials, shipping containers, or heavy pipes, our fleet is equipped to handle standard and oversized deck loads across KSA.

fleetDetails.availability: Immediate mobilization across Eastern, Central, and Western regions

title: Lowbed Trailer Rental
description: Specialized heavy equipment transportation for oversized and heavy machinery.
overview: GQS specializes in lowbed trailer solutions designed for tall, heavy, and oversized machinery. Our low deck heights ensure safe clearance for high-profile equipment such as excavators, cranes, and industrial modules.
features: Low deck height for high clearance

fleetDetails.availability: Specialized units available for project-based long-term hire

title: Excavator Rental
description: Tracked and wheeled excavators for earthworks and plant projects.
overview: Our excavator fleet includes various sizes and attachment options to suit any project, from small trenching to major earthmoving operations.

fleetDetails.availability: Daily, Weekly, and Monthly rental options

title: Crane Rental
description: Lift planning with certified operators and rigging supervision.
overview: Safe and efficient lifting solutions with a range of mobile and crawler cranes. We provide full lift planning and risk assessments for every deployment.

title: Hiab Truck Rental
description: Knuckle-boom precision for congested sites and tight lifts.
overview: Our Hiab trucks combine transport and lifting in one unit, making them ideal for urban projects and tight industrial spaces.

title: Industrial Logistics Coordination
description: Managing complex supply chains for industrial projects.
overview: Centralized coordination for all your industrial logistics needs, ensuring seamless movement of materials and equipment.

title: Wheel Loader Rental
description: High-capacity wheel loaders for material loading and site logistics support.
overview: Our wheel loader rental fleet features advanced, high-efficiency material loaders designed for aggregate handling, bulk material movement, and industrial site support across Saudi Arabia.

fleetDetails.availability: Immediate mobilization for short & long term contracts

title: Forklift Rental
description: Industrial forklifts for warehouse operations, cargo handling, and logistics.
overview: GQS offers robust diesel and electric forklift rental options with varying lift capacities and mast heights to support warehouse operations, factory logistics, and cargo handling.

title: Heavy Cargo Haulage
description: Specialized multi-axle heavy haulage solutions for oversized industrial cargos.
overview: Our heavy cargo haulage services utilize high-tonnage multi-axle systems and specialized step-decks to transport oversized pressure vessels, plant modules, and high-value components safely under strict engineering compliance.

fleetDetails.availability: Requires engineered route survey before deployment

title: Industrial Rigging Support
description: Professional lifting coordination, rigging crews, and TUV certified supervision.
overview: GQS provides fully managed industrial rigging services including site heavy-lift plans, professional rigging crews, Aramco approved riggers, and certified lifting equipment sets to ensure secure lifts.

fleetDetails.availability: Available with complete technical field teams
